const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});

text(r.output);

text(r.output);

text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find . -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/snapshot*' -o -path '*/record/documents*' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/ca1/30929/record -type f -maxdepth 4 -print | sort && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca1/30929/events/evt-appeal-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/ca1/30929/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca1/30929/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search.*opinion|citation|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));

text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -l 'decision_target: disposition' data/cases --glob 'event.yaml' | head -n 20 && rg -l 'event_id: evt-appeal-disposition' data/cases --glob 'event.yaml' | head -n 20","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,220p' tests/cassettes/realistic-grant/reasoning.md && sed -n '1,160p' tests/cassettes/realistic-grant/prediction.json && sed -n '360,420p' tests/test_seed.py && sed -n '110,150p' tests/test_ingest.py && sed -n '40,80p' .github/prompts/reconcile.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find .codex -maxdepth 3 -type f -print | sort | head -n 40 && find . -maxdepth 3 -iname '*manifest*' -type f -print | sort | head -n 80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '{id,case_name,docket_number,date_filed,date_terminated,date_last_filing,date_last_index,date_modified,blocked,date_blocked,nature_of_suit,appeal_from_str,appellate_case_type_information,original_court_info,docket_entries:[.docket_entries[]|{id,date_filed,description}]}' data/cases/ca1/30929/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000});
text(r.output);
